title: Hyperwallet: What is it?
bodyHtml:
Hyperwallet is our new payment partner, this change allows us to continue our growth and international expansion. Integrating Hyperwallet enables us to have access to even more payment methods to reach and satisfy even more customers.

This very good news comes with an extra effort on your side, though. To continue receiving the payout of your Back Market's sales, you have to pass the Hyperwallet KYB process. It's pretty simple, you just have to provide us a little information (personal information of Business contacts, directors and beneficial owners for example) and legal documentation (Passport, driver's licence, government ID or article of incorporation for example) directly in your Seller back office.

Please find attached the T&Cs of Hyperwallet.

What do you need to provide? 

  • Personal information (name, date of birth, etc.), contact information and home address of Business contacts.
  • Business information about your business (legal name, business registration number, business contact information, business address).
  • Personal information (name, date of birth, etc.), contact information and home address of directors.
  • Personal information (name, date of birth, etc.), contact information and home address of beneficial owners (person who controls or owns more than 25% of the shared, voting rights and other interests).

Which related documents do you need?

  • Business contacts: Passport / Driver's licence / Government ID.
  • Proof of business: Articles of incorporation.
  • Beneficial owners: Passport / Driver's licence / Government ID.
